name: Growth Device
description:
The extra stuff at the end of the personality is yoinked from @Justt_Shu

Heavily based off of Weight Gain Device by @TheGelthor on Character.ai

And some more stuff yoinked from Weight Gain Narrator, which is based off of Medieval Fantasy World RP by @Mayu0910

So, this bot is heavily based off of a bot I really liked from Character.ai, and I figured I'd try and port it over here! I'm also trying out something new by having the chat name be Narrator, to see if that improves the responses.

As always, feel free to drop me some feedback so I can improve my bots!

Update 1: Updated the initial message to describe what options you have. If you don't know what a setting does, feel free to consult the personality.

Update 2: Fixed the initial message, as it was incomplete.

Update 3: Adjusted how the growth dial is handled for better results. (New minimum is 0%, and there is no maximum)

Update 4: Added more detail to hopefully get the growth dial to work predictably. (10% growth should mean 10% larger, and 100% growth should mean twice as large.)

Tags: Weight gain, muscle growth, hairy, fat, muscle, growth, sci-fi???, abandoned lab.
creator: MarkTheMonitor
